data.body:
## Adversarial Review Finding
[Conflicting Assumptions] Story 1's blast-radius scoring uses ~40 known file patterns. Story 4's file impact scan uses codebase analysis. These are intentionally different mechanisms at different pipeline stages (routing vs task planning). Document that blast-radius patterns are a routing heuristic, not a comprehensive file list — implementation-plan's independent scan is the authoritative file enumeration.
